# ashtakavarga

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/ashtakavarga"
```

Package ashtakavarga implements the Ashtakavarga point system from Vedic astrology \(BPHS \- Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra\).

Each of the seven traditional planets \(Sun through Saturn\) and the Ascendant contribute benefic points \(bindus\) to the twelve sidereal signs. The Sarvashtakavarga \(SAV\) is the aggregate of all individual planet tables, used to assess overall sign strength.

<a name="AshtakavargaResult"></a>
## type [AshtakavargaResult](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/ashtakavarga/ashtakavarga.go#L16-L20>)

AshtakavargaResult holds the complete Ashtakavarga analysis.

```go
type AshtakavargaResult struct {
    PlanetTables []BinduTable `json:"planet_tables"` // 7 planets (Sun-Saturn)
    SAV          [12]int      `json:"sarvashtakavarga"`
    SAVTotal     int          `json:"sav_total"`
}
```

<a name="CalcAshtakavarga"></a>
### func [CalcAshtakavarga](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/ashtakavarga/ashtakavarga.go#L125>)

```go
func CalcAshtakavarga(positions []vedic.SiderealPosition, siderealASC float64) *AshtakavargaResult
```

CalcAshtakavarga computes the Ashtakavarga tables for the seven traditional planets. positions must contain sidereal longitudes; siderealASC is the sidereal ascendant longitude.

<a name="BinduTable"></a>
## type [BinduTable](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/ashtakavarga/ashtakavarga.go#L9-L13>)

BinduTable holds the per\-sign bindu count for one planet.

```go
type BinduTable struct {
    Planet models.PlanetID `json:"planet"`
    Bindus [12]int         `json:"bindus"` // Points per sign (0-11 = Aries-Pisces sidereal)
    Total  int             `json:"total"`  // Sum of all bindus (max 48)
}
```
